name: CELLZ
subtitle: Programmable CV Touch Pad
summary: A 12 HP programmable CV touch pad with 16 capacitive pads arranged in a 4×4 grid. Each pad stores two independent 12-bit CV values (0–10 V), with selectable semi-tone quantized or free-scale modes. Touch a pad to output its stored values; touch multiple pads to arpeggiate. Two LFO trigger inputs allow automatic cycling through the pads, designed to pair with the Chipz LFO outputs.
